name: @cairn/core
description: The Cairn serial router, offline adapter seam, records, and Git protections

scripts.build: node scripts/clean-dist.mjs && npm run sync-contract && tsc
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/test/gates.test.js dist/test/files.test.js dist/test/steps.test.js dist/test/routing.test.js dist/test/serial.test.js
